name: code-toolkit
description: Process-discipline + canon-grounded coding toolkit for Codex CLI — Superpowers-style 8-stage workflow (brainstorm → plan → SDD → TDD iron-law → systematic-debugging → code-review → verification → finish-branch + using-git-worktrees auxiliary) with SessionStart hook auto-injection, plus byte-identical functional copy of `domain-teams:code-team` 8-source primary-grounding (Clean Code / Pragmatic Programmer / SOLID / Beck 2002 TDD / Fowler 2018 Refactoring / Feathers 2004 Legacy Code / OWASP ASVS v5.0.0 / 徳丸本 第 2 版 Ch.6 multi-byte encoding security). 10 skills total (9 of 9 planned + router); full Superpowers parity reached at v0.3.0. v0.4.0 adds the Codex CLI variant (this manifest) on top of the Claude Code release shipped at v0.3.0 (see `.claude-plugin/plugin.json`). Hook emits portable `additional_context` JSON key for Codex CLI consumption. Coexists with `domain-teams:code-team` (passive gate entry) and `dev-workflow:{git-memory, complexity-critique}`; conflicts with `obra/superpowers` resolved via CODE_TOOLKIT_MODE env var.

interface.shortDescription: Process-discipline + canon-grounded coding workflow for Codex CLI
interface.longDescription: Use code-toolkit to drive agent work through brainstorming, plan-writing, subagent-driven development, TDD iron-law, systematic debugging, code review, verification-before-completion, and finish-branch. Each rule grounded in primary sources (Beck 2002 TDD / Martin 2008 Clean Code / Hunt & Thomas 2019 Pragmatic Programmer / Martin 2000-2017 SOLID / Fowler 2018 Refactoring / Feathers 2004 Legacy Code / OWASP ASVS v5.0.0 / 徳丸本 第 2 版 Ch.6 encoding security). 10 skills total; full Superpowers parity at v0.3.0. Coexists with `domain-teams:code-team` (passive gate) and `dev-workflow:{git-memory, complexity-critique, proposal-critique}`. SessionStart hook auto-injects router; `CODE_TOOLKIT_MODE=off` disables for users running obra/superpowers concurrently.
defaultPrompt: Let's add a feature to this project.
I want to refactor this module.
